phases.label: Ownership and Orientation
goals: Assess authentic familiarity with the case
Establish candidate ownership of the submission
Confirm accurate knowledge of patient, timeline, and decisions

phases.label: Clinical Reasoning Defense
goals: Defend major clinical decisions described in the submission

phases.label: Reflection and Limitations
goals: Identify learning, uncertainty, and possible improvements
Probe depth of understanding beyond the written text

phases.label: Consistency and Depth Probe
goals: Test alignment between verbal responses and written submission
Probe vague, inconsistent, or generic answers
